notes: Removed the minimap feature entirely (user request). Deleted: the floating minimap panel + expanded map panel markup, all minimap CSS, the 🗺 マップ cbar button, the WebGL top-down render-to-target pipeline (renderMinimapToCanvas / mmCamera / mmRT / mmBigRT), per-frame minimap updates in the animate loop, requestMinimapUpdate() and its ~14 call sites, the minimap range controls, drag/pan/teleport handlers, and the sun/closeAllPanels/showHUD mutual-exclusion hooks. ~24 KB smaller. Verified on a real 355 MB RAD scene: viewer boots clean (no ReferenceErrors), scene renders, HUD shows, sun toggle + add-cube/figure + camera tool all work, and no minimap DOM/functions remain. Builds on v0.0.26.
